name: iframe-helper-sdk
description: TypeScript SDK for secure cross-domain iframe embeds with a strict postMessage bridge, origin validation, handshakes, RPC-style requests, events, and typed contracts.

scripts.build:dev: vite build --mode development && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json && node scripts/prepare-cjs-types.mjs
scripts.build:prod: vite build && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json && node scripts/prepare-cjs-types.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run test && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run publint && npm run types:check && npm run pack:check
scripts.format: prettier --write .prettierrc package.json package-lock.json README.md documentation/docs documentation/docusaurus.config.js documentation/sidebars.js documentation/package.json documentation/package-lock.json documentation/src playground scripts tests "tsconfig*.json" "*.config.*" src
scripts.format:check: prettier --check .prettierrc package.json package-lock.json README.md documentation/docs documentation/docusaurus.config.js documentation/sidebars.js documentation/package.json documentation/package-lock.json documentation/src playground scripts tests "tsconfig*.json" "*.config.*" src
